title: Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Document hosted on Thailand's National Cyber Security Agency (NCSA / สกมช.) domain explaining post-quantum cryptography and the need for Thai organisations to prepare information systems for the arrival of quantum computers and adopt PQC standards.

title: QUANTA: National Post-Quantum Cryptography Readiness Platform
summary: NCSA's national platform (QUANTA) to lead Thailand's transition to the quantum era, educating and preparing public and private organisations and providing tools and labs to support migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography standards.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Migration Roadmap (QUANTA)
summary: NCSA phased PQC migration roadmap setting out discovery and risk assessment, PQC integration, and full system migration, targeting completion of the national transition to quantum-resistant cryptography by 2035.

title: Recommended Post-Quantum Cryptography Standards (QUANTA)
summary: NCSA QUANTA page recommending NIST PQC standards for Thai organisations: FIPS 203 (ML-KEM) for key encapsulation, FIPS 204 (ML-DSA) for digital signatures, and FIPS 205 (SLH-DSA) for long-term archival.

title: Quantum risk: a new digital threat that should not be overlooked
summary: English-language article by the SEC Thailand IT Audit and Cyber Risk Supervision Department warning that quantum computing endangers the cryptography protecting capital-market data, and presenting Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution as the principal mitigations. Frames quantum risk as a present concern for financial institutions and securities-market participants.

title: ความเสี่ยงควอนตัม: ภัยดิจิทัลรูปแบบใหม่ที่ไม่ควรมองข้าม (Quantum risk article, Thai)
summary: Thai-language version (BE 2568 / 2025) of the SEC Thailand IT Audit and Cyber Risk Supervision Department article on quantum risk, explaining Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and QKD and urging proactive preparation against the 'harvest now, decrypt later' threat to encrypted financial and customer data.

title: SEC Thailand quantum risk / post-quantum cryptography article (Feb 2026)
summary: Thai-language article (dated 20 February BE 2569 / 2026) by the SEC Thailand IT Audit and Cyber Risk Supervision Department addressing quantum risk and post-quantum cryptography readiness for the Thai capital market, continuing the regulator's quantum-risk awareness series.

title: Cyber Resilience knowledge hub: Quantum Risk
summary: SEC Thailand cyber-resilience knowledge page dedicated to quantum risk, explaining how quantum computing threatens current encryption and outlining Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution as protective approaches for capital-market participants.

title: 10 Technologies to Watch 2025: Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC)
summary: Awareness article (27 August 2025) by Thailand's National Science and Technology Development Agency (NSTDA, under the Ministry of Higher Education, Science, Research and Innovation) featuring Post-Quantum Cryptography in its '10 Technologies to Watch 2025' series, explaining the quantum threat to RSA/ECC, the 'harvest now, decrypt later' risk, NIST-standardised algorithms, and Thai government preparedness.
